page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at a base frequency of 2.6 GHz. The instance is configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 16 physical cores, operating with a single thread per core configuration to ensure predictable compute performance without hyperthreading resource sharing.

The hardware profile includes 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single integrated GPU equipped with 96 GB of dedicated VRAM. This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The lack of local storage requires architectural reliance on network storage, which may impact I/O-heavy workloads. However, the dedicated core allocation and high VRAM-to-system-RAM ratio offer qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive parallel processing tasks. This server is designed for workloads such as GPU-accelerated data science, machine learning inference, and graphics rendering pipelines that require substantial video memory but do not demand local high-speed scratch disks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8469C processor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with a single thread per core, operating at 2.6 GHz. The hardware configuration delivers 96.0 GB of system memory alongside a single GPU with 96 GB of VRAM. Notably, the instance lacks local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This resource profile is structured for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution and high-capacity GPU memory, such as machine learning inference, parallel compute tasks, and data science operations, while presenting a tradeoff in local disk I/O performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 96 GB of system RAM, a single GPU with 96 GB of VRAM, and 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon instance with 96 GB of system memory and a 96 GB VRAM GPU for accelerated parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8469C vCPUs with single-thread-per-core execution.
Single GPU with 96 GB of dedicated VRAM for accelerated processing.
96.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB per core.
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage configurations.
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.
Best-fit for machine learning inference and GPU-accelerated data science.
